exercises.title: 7-Qubit Color Code Builder
tasks: Define vertex positions and connectivity
Identify all faces and their colors
Generate X and Z stabilizers for each face
Verify stabilizer commutation relations
Construct logical X and Z operators
hints: 7 vertices, 6 triangular faces (2 of each color)
Each face defines one X-stab and one Z-stab

exercises.title: Transversal Gate Verifier
exercises.description: Verify that Clifford gates are transversal in color codes.
tasks: Apply H to each qubit and check stabilizer transformation
Apply S to each qubit and verify stabilizers preserved
Verify logical H swaps X_L and Z_L
Implement transversal CNOT between two code blocks
Compare to surface code (only CNOT transversal)
hints: S: X→Y, Z→Z, affects stabilizer phases

exercises.title: Color Code Syndrome Calculator
exercises.description: Compute syndromes for errors in color codes.
tasks: Apply X, Z, and Y errors at each vertex
Compute syndromes for each face (all three colors)
Verify single error creates 3 syndromes (one per color)
Analyze syndrome patterns for multi-qubit errors
Compare to surface code syndrome structure
hints: X error triggers Z-stabilizers on adjacent faces
Each vertex touches 3 faces (one of each color)
Y = XZ triggers both X and Z syndromes

exercises.title: Hexagonal Color Code
exercises.description: Build larger color code on hexagonal lattice.
tasks: Generate hexagonal lattice of given size
3-color the faces (R, G, B)
Create all stabilizers from face coloring
Compute code parameters [[n, k, d]]
Identify logical operators
hints: Use axial coordinates for hex grid
